name: Mountain Macaroni

ingredients.item: potatoes, boiled in their skins then cut into 2 cm cubes

method: Serves 4 300 g penne or macaroni 125 g unsalted butter 1 large onion, sliced 150 g bacon, diced 200 ml cream 1 fresh bay leaf ground black pepper 100 g grated Gruyère 100 g grated Emmental 300 g potatoes, boiled in their skins then cut into 2 cm cubes
Boil the penne in plenty of salted water until half-cooked (about 3 or 4 minutes). Drain and place in a buttered ovenproof dish, dotting with 25 g of the butter so the pasta doesn’t stick.

Add the cream sauce, cheeses and potatoes to the penne and mix everything together. Dot small pieces of the remaining butter over the top of the pasta. Bake in the oven for about 15 minutes, or until it bubbles and starts to turn golden.
